perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a patterned flat cap is speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting, holding a clear plastic phone case and a smartphone. (2) The scene cuts to extreme close-ups of the imos brand phone case being handled, showing details of the Magsafe ring and the side buttons. (3) Side-by-side comparisons of a clear case after 3 months of use versus a new imos case are shown on a wooden surface. (4) Hands demonstrate the functionality of the camera control button on the iPhone through the case. (5) The man drops the phone onto a wooden floor to demonstrate impact resistance. (6) A lineup of five different colored phone cases is displayed on a table. (7) The man returns to a talking-head shot to provide closing remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in Mandarin with a friendly, energetic, and professional tone. (2) Upbeat, medium-tempo Lo-fi background music plays continuously throughout the video. (3) Sharp 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects occur in sync with text overlays and visual transitions. (4) A distinct 'thud' sound is heard when the phone is dropped during the durability test. (5) Studio-quality audio with no significant ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Full Mandarin subtitles for the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'imos', 'iPhone 16', '3 months later comparison' (emotional/curiosity hook), 'Anti-yellowing', 'MIL-STD-810H', 'BUY NOW' with a shopping cart icon.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook/Intro -> Comparison/Evidence -> Feature Deep Dive -> Durability Proof -> Variety Showcase -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator/host throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing glasses, a blue/grey patterned flat cap, and a light grey t-shirt with a 'Roots' logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Switching between a plain grey studio wall with minimalist art and a wooden table top used for product close-ups.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights, bright and shadow-free.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut with beat-sync sound effects.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem Identification -> Product Solution -> Technical Feature Listing -> Durability Testing -> Selection Options -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and endorse the 'imos' military-grade clear phone case for the iPhone 16 series by addressing common consumer pain points like yellowing, button sensitivity, and drop damage through visual proof and technical demonstrations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host holds the product, demonstrates its specific features, compares it favorably to old versions, and provides a direct call to action with a 'Buy Now' button.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature flat cap and the '3c' branding in the corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High-quality production values typical of tech influencers, emphasizing tactile feedback and durability tests to build trust.
